nodes.label: Three fragmented AI conversation stores
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Hub & ERA/FABLED 2/2 - FABLED 2 — Gaps & Missing.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: AI chat, ERA conversations, and Budget AI messages have three shapes with no canonical owner or migration intent.

nodes.label: Unimported Web-Speech voice path
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Hub & ERA/FABLED 2/2 - FABLED 2 — Gaps & Missing.md
nodes.author: Elio

nodes.label: Untested money-capable intent router
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Hub & ERA/FABLED 2/2 - FABLED 2 — Gaps & Missing.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: No utterance-to-face-intent fixtures or confidence threshold protect a router whose downstream blast radius now includes more money actions.

nodes.label: Shallow proactive ERA read path
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Hub & ERA/FABLED 2/2 - FABLED 2 — Gaps & Missing.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: No signals registry, composer, or briefing bundle exists even though surrounding modules produced forecast and notification substrate.

nodes.label: Unresolved two-assistant convergence story
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Hub & ERA/FABLED 2/2 - FABLED 2 — Gaps & Missing.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: ERA and the Budget-scoped analysis assistant expose different capabilities, renderers, and stores without a user-facing division of responsibility.
